title: BSF Receives $25,000 Donation from the Thomas and Cindy Massie Foundation
summary: BSNC extends its heartfelt gratitude to the Thomas and Cindy Massie Foundation for its generous donation of $25,000 to the Bering Straits Foundation (BSF). This significant contribution from the Massie Foundation plays a vital role in supporting scholarships for BSNC shareholders and descendants who...

title: Corporate Transparency in 2024 – Filing Requirements & Deadlines
summary: In 2024, preparing for corporate transparency is of utmost importance for businesses. The new regulatory update requires all new businesses to file a Beneficial Ownership Information (BOI) report with the U.S. Treasury within 90 days of incorporation. This no-fee filing is designed to inform the gov...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 11 December, 2023
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 11 December, 2023 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
